item.title: Big Concrete Job Incoming
item.description: A look at an upcoming concrete project from Victory Outdoor Services, focused on the work ahead and the scale of the job.

item.description: A simple crew outing that highlights teamwork and time away from the job site.

item.description: A concrete job with a moment Eric won’t forget, highlighting the work and teamwork on site.

item.title: Spotting a Dip in the Concrete
item.description: A quick look at a concrete dip on the job site and how crews identify issues before moving forward.

item.title: Gravel Over a Trap on the Worksite
item.description: A look at gravel being placed over a trap on the job site, highlighting a practical construction step from Victory Outdoor Services.

item.title: Cleaning Concrete with a Skid Loader
item.description: A skid loader cleans concrete quickly on the job site, showing efficient equipment use and steady work in action.

media:content.media:title: Cleaning Concrete with a Skid Loader
media:content.media:description: A skid loader cleans concrete quickly on the job site, showing efficient equipment use and steady work in action.

item.title: Concrete Basics: Form, Pour, Finish
item.description: Learn the key steps of a concrete project, from setting forms and pouring the mix to finishing the surface for a clean result.

media:content.media:title: Concrete Basics: Form, Pour, Finish
media:content.media:description: Learn the key steps of a concrete project, from setting forms and pouring the mix to finishing the surface for a clean result.

item.title: Using the Edger the Right Way
item.description: A quick concrete tip on proper edger use for cleaner edges and a better finish on the job site.

media:content.media:description: A quick concrete tip on proper edger use for cleaner edges and a better finish on the job site.

item.title: A Smooth Concrete Pour in Action
item.description: A clean concrete pour with a satisfying finish, highlighting the craftsmanship and process behind the work.

media:content.media:description: A clean concrete pour with a satisfying finish, highlighting the craftsmanship and process behind the work.
